turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Can I make a payment over the phone for my outstanding bill?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We don't process card payments directly over the phone for security reasons, but there are a few easy options. May I know your name first?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Merchant, you can pay via UPI — just send the amount to our UPI ID sunriseclinic@axisbank — or through our patient portal where you log in with your registered mobile number. You can also pay in person at our billing counter.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: The UPI option works. What's the amount due?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check... Your outstanding balance is ₹4,250 for the OPD visit on the 8th. Once you make the payment, WhatsApp a screenshot to 9876543200 and we'll send a digital receipt.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Simple enough. I'll do it right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wonderful. Do reach out if the payment doesn't reflect within 24 hours. Have a good day, Mr. Merchant!
